CVE-2017-17507.title: In HDF5 1.10.1, there is an out of bounds read vulnerability in t ...
CVE-2017-17507.description: In HDF5 1.10.1, there is an out of bounds read vulnerability in the function H5T_conv_struct_opt in H5Tconv.c in libhdf5.a. For example, h5dump would crash when someone opens a crafted hdf5 file.

CVE-2018-17432.title: A NULL pointer dereference in H5O_sdspace_encode() in H5Osdspace. ...
CVE-2018-17432.description: A NULL pointer dereference in H5O_sdspace_encode() in H5Osdspace.c in the HDF HDF5 through 1.10.3 library allows attackers to cause a denial of service via a crafted HDF5 file.

CVE-2018-17438.title: A SIGFPE signal is raised in the function H5D__select_io() of H5D ...
CVE-2018-17438.description: A SIGFPE signal is raised in the function H5D__select_io() of H5Dselect.c in the HDF HDF5 through 1.10.3 library during an attempted parse of a crafted HDF file, because of incorrect protection against division by zero. It could allow a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2019-8397.title: An issue was discovered in the HDF HDF5 1.10.4 library. There is  ...
CVE-2019-8397.description: An issue was discovered in the HDF HDF5 1.10.4 library. There is an out of bounds read in the function H5T_close_real in H5T.c.

CVE-2019-9151.title: An issue was discovered in the HDF HDF5 1.10.4 library. There is  ...
CVE-2019-9151.description: An issue was discovered in the HDF HDF5 1.10.4 library. There is an out of bounds read in the function H5VM_memcpyvv in H5VM.c when called from H5D__compact_readvv in H5Dcompact.c.

CVE-2019-9152.title: An issue was discovered in the HDF HDF5 1.10.4 library. There is  ...
CVE-2019-9152.description: An issue was discovered in the HDF HDF5 1.10.4 library. There is an out of bounds read in the function H5MM_xstrdup in H5MM.c when called from H5O_dtype_decode_helper in H5Odtype.c.
